items.title: PSG vs Arsenal: Three key individual matchups that could decide the Champions League final
items.summary: It will be interesting to see how Arsenal deal with PSG's free-flowing football. But individual match-ups between players will also be important.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sooryavanshi finishes IPL 2026 with big lead in Orange Cap race
items.summary: Sbhubman Gill's match-winning century kept him on track to take the Orange Cap away, while Kagiso Rabada got past Bhuvneshwar Kumar to take the Purple Cap
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: The clearest sign Father Time is closing in on Djokovic?
items.summary: Why Novak Djokovic's French Open exit is another golden opportunity lost for the 39-year-old - as teenager Joao Fonseca comes of age.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
